name: Indy Golf Den
about: Located in Carmel, IN, Indy Golf Den offers a premier golf simulation experience in a private, immersive environment. The venue features a single, private simulator equipped with professional-grade technology including an Advanced Overhead Launch Monitor, high-performance gaming computer, and premium projector screen. It is designed to be a peaceful, focused sanctuary for golfers of all skill levels to practice, play, or take lessons without distractions. The space is equipped with private bathroom facilities, a kitchen with ice maker and water, and on-site golf club rentals for traveling guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Entire private space for a distraction-free environment
Professional-grade overhead launch monitor with comprehensive data tracking
Access to thousands of real-world and user-created golf courses
Ideal setting for focused golf instruction and practice
Comfortable amenities including kitchen facilities and club rentals

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen facilities with ice maker and water available on-site
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade overhead launch monitor tracking ball speed, launch angle, spin rate, carry distance, and smash factor

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, on-site golf clubs are available for traveling guests, though you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has kitchen facilities with an ice maker and water available for guest use.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the course selected and number of players, but golf simulation typically rounds are faster than traditional golf.

faq.question: Is Indy Golf Den kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is private and focused, making it suitable for families with older children, though there are no specific kid-oriented amenities mentioned.
